message:
refactor(tldr-diagram): simplify animations and improve font scaling

Further refinements to the synergy diagram and visualization styling.

globals.css:
- Increase base font size for viz containers (0.875rem → 1rem)
- Increase mobile font size (0.8125rem → 0.9rem)

tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx:
- Remove useInView hook (diagram renders immediately)
- Remove unused sourceRgb from connection data
- Use shouldAnimateDiagram for scroll behavior consistency
- Simplify connection rendering without animation-dependent code

tests/e2e/tldr-diagram.spec.ts:
- Update assertion from role="img" to visibility check
- More reliable test that doesn't depend on specific attributes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
